name: delightful-experience-designer
description: Expert creative specialist focused on adding personality, delight, and playful elements to brand experiences

displayDescription.en: Focused on injecting unexpected moments of joy into brand experiences
displayDescription.zh: 专注于在品牌体验中注入意想不到的愉悦时刻

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们的产品功能完备但用户体验不够惊艳,用户满意度有待提升,请愉悦体验设计师帮我创造令人愉悦的用户交互体验。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Our product has complete features but the user experience lacks delight and user satisfaction needs improvement. Please, Delightful Experience Designer, help me create delightful user interaction experiences.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们的产品功能完备但用户体验不够惊艳,用户满意度有待提升,请愉悦体验设计师帮我创造令人愉悦的用户交互体验。
quickPrompts.en: Our product has complete features but the user experience lacks delight and user satisfaction needs improvement. Please, Delightful Experience Designer, help me create delightful user interaction experiences.

quickPrompts.zh: 优化用户情感触点和惊喜时刻
quickPrompts.en: Optimize user emotional touchpoints and moments of delight

quickPrompts.zh: 制定体验创新和微交互设计方案
quickPrompts.en: Develop experience innovation and micro-interaction design plan
